        WHERE [c].[PatientId] = @__consultation_PatientId_0 AND [c].[Id] <> @__consultation_Id_1 AND [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_2) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

A common cause of this error is disposing a context instance that was resolved from dependency injection and then later trying to use the same context instance elsewhere in your application. This may occur if you are calling 'Dispose' on the context instance, or wrapping it in a using statement. If you are using dependency injection, you should let the dependency injection container take care of disposing context instances.

        FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
    ) AS [c0] ON [i].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[PhotoUrl], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
        FROM [Patients] AS [p]
    ) AS [p0] ON [i].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
    ) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[AppointmentId], [c1].[ChiefComplaint], [c1].[ConsultationDate], [c1].[ConsultationFee], [c1].[ConsultationType], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[Diagnosis], [c1].[DoctorId], [c1].[Examination], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[Notes], [c1].[OrganizationId], [c1].[PatientId], [c1].[Symptoms], [c1].[TreatmentPlan], [c1].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Consultations] AS [c1]
    ) AS [c2] ON [i].[ConsultationId] = [c2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
        FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
    ) AS [d0] ON [c2].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    ) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
    ) AS [p2] ON [i].[PrescriptionId] = [p2].[Id]
    WHERE [i].[Id] = @__8__locals1_request_Id_0 AND [i].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_1 AND [i].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p3].[Id], [p3].[ContainerSize], [p3].[CreatedAt], [p3].[DispensedQuantity], [p3].[DispensingForm], [p3].[Dosage], [p3].[Duration], [p3].[Frequency], [p3].[Instructions], [p3].[IsActive], [p3].[MedicineId], [p3].[MedicineName], [p3].[OrganizationId], [p3].[PrescriptionId], [p3].[Quantity], [p3].[Timing], [p3].[TotalPrice], [p3].[UnitPrice], [p3].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [PrescriptionItems] AS [p3]
) AS [p4] ON [s].[Id6] = [p4].[PrescriptionId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i0].[Id], [i0].[CreatedAt], [i0].[Description], [i0].[InvoiceId], [i0].[IsActive], [i0].[ItemType], [i0].[OrganizationId], [i0].[Quantity], [i0].[TotalPrice], [i0].[UnitPrice], [i0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [InvoiceItems] AS [i0]
) AS [i1] ON [s].[Id] = [i1].[InvoiceId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s].[Id2], [s].[Id3], [s].[Id4], [s].[Id5], [s].[Id6], [p4].[Id]
